SOGROM_DICETRAY.Title: Dice Tray
SOGROM_DICETRAY.FormulaPlaceholder: Type a formula or click dice
SOGROM_DICETRAY.SettingShowHint: Set Dice Tray to be visible by default.
SOGROM_DICETRAY.SettingThemeHint: Choose the visual theme for the dice tray.
SOGROM_DICETRAY.SettingCompactHint: Hides the formula display and action buttons. Dice formulas are placed directly in the chat box instead.
SOGROM_DICETRAY.EmptyPool: Add some dice to your pool first!
SOGROM_DICETRAY.RollError: Invalid dice formula. Please check your input.
